inputs.label: Eumelanin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of eumelanin pigment in total melanin content. Typically ranges 60-80% for darker skin.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of eumelanin pigment in total melanin content. Typically ranges 60-80% for darker skin.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam melanin içeriğindeki ömelanin pigmenti yüzdesi. Koyu ten için tipik olarak %60-80 aralığındadır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Eumelanin-Pigments am gesamten Melaningehalt. Typischerweise 60-80% bei dunklerer Haut.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'eumélanine dans le contenu total en mélanine. Généralement 60-80 % pour les peaux plus foncées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de pigmento eumelanina en el contenido total de melanina. Típicamente varía entre 60-80% para piel más oscura.

inputs.label: Pheomelanin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of pheomelanin pigment. Sum with eumelanin should be 100%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of pheomelanin pigment. Sum with eumelanin should be 100%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Feomelanin pigmenti yüzdesi. Ömelanin ile toplamı %100 olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Phäomelanin-Pigments. Summe mit Eumelanin sollte 100% ergeben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de phéomélanine. La somme avec l'eumélanine doit être de 100 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de pigmento feomelanina. La suma con eumelanina debe ser 100%.

inputs.label: Melanocyte Density (cells/mm²)
inputs.businessContext: Number of melanocytes per square millimeter of skin. Typically 900-2000.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of melanocytes per square millimeter of skin. Typically 900-2000.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetre kare başına melanosit sayısı. Tipik olarak 900-2000.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Melanozyten pro Quadratmillimeter Haut. Typischerweise 900-2000.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mélanocytes par millimètre carré de peau. Généralement 900-2000.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de melanocitos por milímetro cuadrado de piel. Típicamente 900-2000.

inputs.label: Avg. Melanin per Cell (ng)
inputs.businessContext: Average melanin content per melanocyte in nanograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average melanin content per melanocyte in nanograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Melanosit başına nanogram cinsinden ortalama melanin içeriği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Melaningehalt pro Melanozyte in Nanogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contenu moyen en mélanine par mélanocyte en nanogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Contenido promedio de melanina por melanocito en nanogramos.

breakdown: Step 1: Calculate eumelanin contribution = Eumelanin (%) × Melanocyte Density × Avg. Melanin per Cell
Step 3: Melanin Index = Eumelanin contribution × Pheomelanin correction
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
